testsuite.name: TestParser
testsuite.system-out: Token à Parser : TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,FLOAT,0,1,> TOKEN<IDENTIFIANT,x,0,7,> TOKEN<EGAL_ASSIGNATION,=,0,9,> TOKEN<PARENTHESE_GAUCHE,(,0,11,> TOKEN<FLOAT,1.5,0,12,> TOKEN<PLUS,+,0,16,> TOKEN<FLOAT,2.4,0,18,> TOKEN<PARENTHESE_DROITE,),0,21,> TOKEN<MULTIPLICATION,*,0,23,> TOKEN<INT,3,0,25,> TOKEN<POINT_VIRGULE,;,0,26,> TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,INT,0,27,> TOKEN<IDENTIFIANT,x,0,31,> TOKEN<EGAL_ASSIGNATION,=,0,33,> TOKEN<PARENTHESE_GAUCHE,(,0,35,> TOKEN<FLOAT,1.5,0,36,> TOKEN<PLUS,+,0,40,> TOKEN<FLOAT,2.4,0,42,> TOKEN<PARENTHESE_DROITE,),0,45,> TOKEN<MULTIPLICATION,*,0,47,> TOKEN<INT,3,0,49,> TOKEN<POINT_VIRGULE,;,0,50,> TOKEN<POINT_VIRGULE,;,0,26,> [VarDeclStmt Type(FLOAT) Identifier(x) AssignmentOperator(=) ExprBinaire ExprBinaire Float(1.5) OperatorCalcul(+) Float(2.4) OperatorCalcul(*) IntLiteral(3), VarDeclStmt Type(INT) Identifier(x) AssignmentOperator(=) ExprBinaire ExprBinaire Float(1.5) OperatorCalcul(+) Float(2.4) OperatorCalcul(*) IntLiteral(3)]
